moments.title: Spain Wins FIFA World Cup 2026
moments.blurb: Spain defeated Argentina 1-0 in extra time to win their second FIFA World Cup title in the final held on July 19, 2026, in New Jersey.

angles.name: Final Recap
angles.copy: Spain are World Champions! A dramatic 1-0 victory over Argentina after extra time saw them lift the trophy on Sunday. Where does this rank in World Cup finals? #FIFAWorldCup

angles.name: Best Moments
angles.copy: The dust has settled on the 2026 World Cup! What was your favourite moment from the tournament, from the group stages to Spain's final triumph? #WorldCup2026

moments.title: Ryan Fox Wins The Open Championship
moments.blurb: New Zealander Ryan Fox claimed his first major title, winning The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale by one stroke on July 19, 2026.

angles.name: Champ Crowned
angles.copy: What a finish at Royal Birkdale! Ryan Fox is your Champion Golfer of the Year, securing The Open title in dramatic fashion on Sunday. #TheOpen

angles.name: Birkdale Drama
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale delivered once again! Ryan Fox's victory at The Open was a nail-biter right to the 18th. Were you watching the final round unfold? #Golf

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays officially begin in England and Wales this week, with many schools breaking up around July 22, 2026.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: It's official: Summer holidays are here for many across England and Wales! Time for flip-flops, ice cream and hopefully some sunshine. What are your plans? #SummerHolidays

angles.name: Holiday Mode
angles.copy: School's out for summer! If you're heading off on staycation or abroad, tell us your top tips for making the most of the long break. #SchoolHolidays

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival brings music, arts, and comedy to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, 2026, featuring a diverse lineup.

angles.name: Latitude Live
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is GO! If you're heading to Henham Park this weekend, who are you most excited to see? Let us know! #LatitudeFestival

angles.name: Suffolk Sounds
angles.copy: Get ready, Suffolk! Latitude Festival kicks off tomorrow, bringing a huge lineup of music, comedy, and arts to Henham Park. Who's got their wellies ready? #Suffolk

moments.title: Truck Festival Opens Its Gates
moments.blurb: Truck Festival, a popular indie and alternative music festival, takes place in Oxfordshire from July 23-26, 2026.

angles.name: Truck On!
angles.copy: Truck Festival is back! Three days of incredible music kick off tomorrow in Oxfordshire. Who's joining the party? #TruckFestival

angles.name: Indie Weekend
angles.copy: Ready for an indie takeover? Truck Festival starts Thursday, bringing some of the best bands to Oxfordshire. What's your must-see act? #FestivalVibes

moments.title: Official Singles Chart Number 1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is the current UK Official Singles Chart Number 1 for the week ending July 23, 2026.

angles.name: New Number One
angles.copy: Huge congrats to Sam Fender and Olivia Dean! 'Rein Me In' is your brand new UK Number 1 single. Are you loving it? #OfficialCharts

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: They've done it! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hit the top spot with 'Rein Me In'. What's your favourite track in the charts right now? #MusicNews

moments.title: Happy 85th Birthday George Clinton
moments.blurb: Funk music pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, turns 85 today, July 22, 2026.

angles.name: Funk Legend
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the one and only George Clinton! The funk architect behind Parliament-Funkadelic. What's your favourite P-Funk track? #GeorgeClinton

angles.name: Birthday Groove
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 85th to funk icon George Clinton! Still bringing the Mothership Connection. Get down with his greatest hits today! #FunkMusic

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, drummer and vocalist for The Eagles, turns 79 today, July 22, 2026.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to The Eagles' legendary voice and drummer, Don Henley! From 'Hotel California' to his solo hits, what's your favourite Henley moment? #DonHenley

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to rock icon Don Henley! Celebrate his 79th with some classic Eagles or his incredible solo tracks. #TheEagles

moments.title: Happy 34th Birthday Selena Gomez
moments.blurb: Singer, actress, and producer Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday today, July 22, 2026.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the amazing Selena Gomez! From pop anthems to powerful acting, she does it all. What's your favourite Selena song? #SelenaGomez

angles.name: Celebrate Selena
angles.copy: Sending birthday love to Selena Gomez, who turns 34 today! Let's celebrate with a playlist of her biggest hits. #HappyBirthdaySelena

moments.title: Happy 61st Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses lead guitarist Slash (Saul Hudson) celebrates his 61st birthday tomorrow, July 23, 2026.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the 61st birthday of guitar god Slash! What's your favourite GNR riff or solo from the legend? #Slash

angles.name: Iconic Shredder
angles.copy: Happy Birthday for tomorrow to the top hat-wearing, guitar-shredding icon, Slash! What's your ultimate Guns N' Roses track? #GunsNRoses

moments.title: Happy 46th Birthday Michelle Williams
moments.blurb: Michelle Williams, Grammy-winning singer and member of Destiny's Child, turns 46 tomorrow, July 23, 2026.

angles.name: Destiny's Child Star
angles.copy: Happy 46th Birthday for tomorrow to the incredible Michelle Williams! From Destiny's Child to her solo career, she's a true talent. #MichelleWilliams

angles.name: R&B Royalty
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic birthday tomorrow to Michelle Williams! Celebrate the Destiny's Child star's 46th with some classic R&B anthems. #DestinysChild

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! On Friday, Mick Jagger turns 83! What's your all-time favourite Rolling Stones track? #MickJagger

angles.name: Stones Icon
angles.copy: He's still got the moves! Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to Mick Jagger on Friday. Let's hear your top Stones picks! #RollingStones

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday Roger Taylor
moments.blurb: Roger Taylor, the iconic drummer and songwriter for Queen, will celebrate his 77th birthday on July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Queen Drummer
angles.copy: Rock royalty alert! This Friday, Queen's legendary drummer Roger Taylor turns 77. What's your favourite Queen song that features his powerful drumming? #RogerTaylor

angles.name: Birthday Beat
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday for Friday to Queen's incredible Roger Taylor! Time to blast some 'Bohemian Rhapsody' in his honour. #Queen

moments.title: Happy 63rd Birthday Fatboy Slim
moments.blurb: Norman Cook, better known as DJ Fatboy Slim, the influential British musician and DJ, turns 63 on July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Big Beat Birthday
angles.copy: Eat, Sleep, Rave, Repeat! Happy 63rd Birthday to the one and only Fatboy Slim on Friday! What's your favourite track to get the party started? #FatboySlim

angles.name: DJ Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a massive happy birthday to British DJ legend Fatboy Slim for Friday! Get your groove on with his classic anthems. #NormanCook

moments.title: Steelhouse Festival Rocks Wales
moments.blurb: The Steelhouse Festival, celebrating classic rock and heavy metal, takes place in Ebbw Vale, South Wales, from July 24-26, 2026.

angles.name: Welsh Rockers
angles.copy: Steelhouse Festival kicks off tomorrow in Ebbw Vale! The mountains are about to rock with some incredible bands. Who's heading to Wales for the metal? #SteelhouseFestival

angles.name: Metal Weekend
angles.copy: Calling all rock and metal fans in Wales! Steelhouse Festival is almost here. Get ready for three days of heavy riffs and epic performances. #WalesEvents

moments.title: Tramlines Festival Returns to Sheffield
moments.blurb: Tramlines Festival, Sheffield's biggest music festival, brings a diverse lineup to Hillsborough Park from July 24-26, 2026.

angles.name: Sheffield Sounds
angles.copy: Sheffield, are you ready? Tramlines Festival returns to Hillsborough Park tomorrow! Who are you buzzin' to see? #Tramlines

angles.name: Yorkshire Festival
angles.copy: Tramlines Festival is almost here! Get ready for a huge weekend of music in Sheffield. What's your top tip for surviving the festival? #Sheffield
